title: Proclamation No. 693, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 693

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES TWO PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF RIZAL, MUNICIPALITY OF MUÑOZ, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the admin­istration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Rizal, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Bsd-6815, to wit:

Lot No. 1052-A — The Municipal Government of Munoz (San Felipe School Site).—A parcel of land (lot No. 1052-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-6815, being a portion of lot No. 1052 of the Cadastral survey of Muiioz, G. L. R. 0. Cad. Record No. 273), situated in the barrio of Rizal, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija. Rounded on the NE. and SE. by lot No. 1052-B of the subdivision on the SW. and NW., by lot No. 1052-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 85° 35’ W., 972.22 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 38, Muñoz Cad No. 126, thence S. 75° 30’ W., 226.61 m. to point “2”; thence N. 9° 05’ W., 49.44 m. to point “3”; thence N. 74° 41’ E., 216.74 m. to point “4”; thence S. 20° 12’ E., 52.55 n. to point 1, point of beginning; containing an area of eleven thousand two hundred fifty-one square meters (11,251), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, are marked by B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 35’ E. date of the original survey, August, 1917-Gebruary 1919 and that of the subdivision survey, August 22, 1939.

NOTE:

Lot No. 1052-A = Lot No. 3101 of Muñoz Cad. No. 126, Case No. 1.

Lot No. 1978-A — The Municipal Government of Muñoz (Rizal School Site). —A parcel of land (lot No. 1978-A of the subdivision plan Bsd-6815, being a portion of lot No 1978 of the cadastral survey of Muñoz, G. L. R. 0. Cad. Record No. 273), situated in the barrio of Rizal, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija. Bounded on the N. and E., by lot No. 1978-B of the subdivision plan; and on the S. and W. by lot No. 1978-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 55° 32′ W., 733.44 m., more or less, from B. B. M. No. 20, Muñoz Cad. No. 126, thence N. 87° 28′ W., 98.10 m. to point “2”; thence N. 1° 50′ E., 114.63 m. to point “3”; thence S. 89° 07′ E., 100.60 m. to point “4”; thence S. 3° 03′ W., 117.53 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of eleven thousand five hundred thirty square meters (11,530), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, are marked by B. L. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 0° 35′ E.; date of the original survey, August, 1917—February, 1919 and that of the subdivision survey, August 21, 1939.

NOTE.—Lot No. 1978-A = Lot No. 3103 of Muñoz Cad. No. 126, Case No. 1.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand an caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fourteenth day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
